amendment_target: Proposal for a regulation — Article 25 — paragraph 2 — point c
body_md:
**Target:** Proposal for a regulation — Article 25 — paragraph 2 — point c

## Text proposed by the Commission

(c) cooperate with competent national authorities, upon a reasoned request, on any action the latter takes in relation to the high-risk AI system.

(c)

(c)

## Amendment of the European Parliament

(c) cooperate with national supervisory authorities, upon a reasoned request, on any action the authority takes to reduce and mitigate the risks posed by the high-risk AI system;

cooperate with competent national authorities, upon a reasoned request, on any action the latter takes in relation to the high-risk AI system.

cooperate with national supervisory authorities, upon a reasoned request, on any action the authority takes to reduce and mitigate the risks posed by the high-risk AI system;
commission_text:
(c) cooperate with competent national authorities, upon a reasoned request, on any action the latter takes in relation to the high-risk AI system.

(c)

(c)
